each lane returns structured findings.evidence: Six read-only explorer lanes returned structured findings that were synthesized into insights/bootstrap-landmine-audit.md.

insights are updated with provenance and.evidence: insights/bootstrap-landmine-audit.md records synthesized source-backed findings and was linked as supporting planning evidence for the six-lane audit.

no source clones are staged.evidence: At audit completion on 2026-05-24, source clones were ignored under sources/ and were outside the audit's intended staged evidence set.

planning SQLite records progress.evidence: At audit completion on 2026-05-24, plans/planning.sqlite3 contained completed worker-run rows for worker-run-audit-code-tests, worker-run-audit-file-justification, worker-run-audit-planning-db, worker-run-audit-public-hygiene, worker-run-audit-skills, and worker-run-audit-source-docs.

six read-only lanes are defined.evidence: The audit was decomposed into six read-only explorer lanes covering sources, skills, source-of-truth docs, planning state, and handoff risk.

sources/, .agents/skills/, and source-of.evidence: insights/bootstrap-landmine-audit.md includes findings across sources/, .agents/skills/, planning SQLite, handoff docs, and source-of-truth documents.

handoff_notes: Structured worker-result artifact added so completed worker runs have repo-local JSON evidence.
risks: Historical explorer lanes share this synthesized result artifact; raw per-lane notes were ephemeral chat outputs and are represented durably only through the planning worker-run IDs plus the tracked synthesis.
summary: Six-lane bootstrap landmine audit completed and synthesized into insights/bootstrap-landmine-audit.md.
